data_description.host: The URL of your Vedetta instance (e.g., http://192.168.1.180:5050)
data_description.api_token: A long-lived API token generated in Vedetta
data_description.mqtt_prefix: The MQTT topic prefix configured in Vedetta (default: vedetta)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Vedetta. Check the URL and API token.

abort.already_configured: This Vedetta instance is already configured.
